label: 第148話
source_locator: 単行本17巻 目次 p.107
summary_short: 真希は呪具を回収するため禪院家へ戻るが、父・扇に襲われる。扇は真希と真依を瀕死にし、呪霊が満ちる懲罰部屋へ投げ込む。
summary_full: 真希は死滅回游に備えて呪具を回収するため禪院家へ戻り、火傷痕を嘲る直哉を退けて忌庫へ向かう。伏黒が当主を引き受けたのは、真希が禪院家の財産と呪具を利用し、真依の居場所を作るためだった。しかし忌庫は空にされ、父・扇が負傷した真依を人質に待ち構えていた。扇と甚壱らは、五条解放を企てる伏黒・真希・真依を謀反人として殺す計画を立てていた。扇は落花の情を居合へ応用し、竜骨を持つ真希を斬り伏せる。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 真希 returns to the 禪院家 to collect 呪具 for the 死滅回游 , but things don't exactly go as planned. Refusing to relinquish the family fortune to 恵 , the upper echelon of the clan conspire to kill him, 真希, and 真依 . 真希 walks right into their trap and is forced to face down her own father.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 直哉 greets 真希 upon her return to house 禪院. In order to fulfill her role in helping to combat the 死滅回游, 真希 returns to a place where she never feels welcome, home. 真希 goes to the 禪院 家／邸宅 to collect 呪具 and is greeted by 直哉 . He taunts her for the injuries to her face and she simply mocks him back. 直哉 believes all 真希 had was her attractiveness and now that it's gone he asks if he should mercilessly bully her as he used to. He follows up by asking if she's just going to follow 恵 and 憂太 like a lapdog but 真希 ignores him and heads underground. 真希 exits a descends stone stairs into an underground tunnel that leads to a reinforced corridor closer to the cursed warehouse. 真希's mother awaits her in the corridor and reminds her that they cannot enter the warehouse. 真希 shows her the keys and says that the head of the clan gave her permission. 真希 was the one who revealed to 恵 that becoming head of the 禪院 clan was in 直毘人 's will. 恵 wanted to refuse but 真希 insisted that he do it. She explained that he would inherit the family fortune as well as gain information about the 御三家 and 呪術総監部. 真希 informing a heavily reluctant 恵 that he's become head of the 禪院 clan. Heavily reluctant, 恵 suggested that he step down and 真希 take over for him but she knew no one would accept her. She pointed out that he's inherited the 禪院 clan's prized 十種影法術 術式 and achieved its 領域展開 . 恵 really didn't want to do it and asked if things like acceptance mattered if she becomes the clan head. She would still get the resources but 真希 doesn't believe she's good enough to make this home a place where 真依 belongs, not yet. Once 真希 said that about her sister, 恵 understood. In the present, as 真希 walks by her mother, she's screamed at by to stop and come back. 真希's mother asks why her daughter is always like this and tells 真希 to make her proud for once to have given birth. 真希 continues to the doors that seal the cursed warehouse and opens them with a key. This unseals all the chains holding the tall pair of doors together, allowing 真希 inside. However, she's shocked by what she see's there, her father unexpectedly sitting inside without a cursed tool in sight. " We must execute 恵, 真希, and 真依 as rebels plotting to free 五条悟. " 扇 reveals that he anticipated 真希's move and emptied out all the 呪具. He stands up, revealing his other daughter's injured body behind him. 真依 has been sliced and is bleeding from her abdomen. 真依 calls her twin an idiot for coming and 真希 yells her name out of concern. Meanwhile, 甚壱 meets with 直哉 to fill him in on the circumstances. 甚壱 explains to 直哉 that 恵 is the better choice for clan head because of his good relationship with 五条悟 and 加茂憲紀 . At the same time, 甚壱 refuses to allow an outsider to inherit the entire fortune. 直哉 asks why they just don't get rid of him then but 甚壱 explains they can't do that. Killing 恵 outright will hurt the 禪院 clan's standing with the other 五条 and 加茂 clans and they would fall behind in the power vacuum left behind by 悟. 直哉 asks why they're doing it now if that's the case and 甚壱 explains they're going to take advantage of the notice from 呪術総監部. It has been deemed a crime to unseal 五条悟, so the 禪院 clan is going to execute 恵, 真希, and 真依 as rebels plotting to do so. 直哉 is amused by the plan and while killing his own daughters will boost 扇's credibility, 直哉 wonders if he is okay with this idea. As 扇 stands takes his swordsmanship stance across from 真希, 甚壱 reveals to 直哉 that this plan was 扇's idea. 真希 uses 竜骨 to break her father's katana. 扇 activates 落花の情 and applies it to the sword standoff. He kept 真依 alive as a bargaining chip in case 真希 arrived with any unknown 呪具 that caused an emergency situation. Aware of any potential contingencies, 扇 readied himself to unleash a single mighty slash. 真希 wields 組屋鞣造 's masterpiece, the cursed tool 竜骨 . After accumulating force and 呪力 , the user can eject them out of the black of the blade to increase its cutting power. 真希 plans to take advantage of 扇's ignorance of 竜骨 and feign entering a single strike duel while actually intending to hit back more than once. Just before ending the standoff to engage, 扇 asks why 真希 thinks 直毘人 was chosen over him as head of the clan. 真希 asks if it's because he's a terrible person willing to kill his own children, prompting the start of the fight. 扇 unsheaths his blade while 真希 flips 竜骨 into a reverse grip. She blocks 扇's first slash and follows up with an attack of her own utilizing the momentum granted by 呪力 shooting out the back of the blade. 扇 tries to parry but his katana's blade is broken, allowing 真希 to get behind him and go for the finishing blow. 扇 cuts down his own daughter. With extreme reaction time, 扇 quickly spins around and counters his with his blazing 術式, cutting 真希 down before the broken blade even hits the ground. 真希's injured eye is cut, breaking her glasses and her lower abdomen is sliced open as well.  Left with grievous injuries, 真希 doesn't understand what happened until she realizes that 扇's blade has been replaced by the flames of his 術式. As she falls defeated, 扇 sheds a tear and reveals he couldn't become clan head because his children are worthless.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 禪院直哉 禪院真希 乙骨憂太 (言及のみ) 真希 and 真依's Mother 伏黒恵 禪院真依 禪院扇 甚壱 禪院 組屋鞣造 (言及のみ)
candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 禪院家邸宅 Cursed Warehouse Cursed Warehouse
candidate_evidence.battles_events_raw_text: 禪院真希 vs. 禪院扇 (開始)
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 呪具 竜骨 禪院扇の術式 焦眉之赳 落花の情

key_events_verified_phase8: 真希が禪院家の忌庫へ呪具を取りに戻る
伏黒が当主を引き受けた理由が示される
禪院家上層部の粛清計画が明かされる
扇が真依を負傷させて真希を待ち伏せする
扇が真希を斬り伏せる
verification_notes_phase8: 集英社公式16～18巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第八段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
